reviews.text:
I strongly advise anyone considering treatment at LMA Clinic to think very carefully before committing. My experience was disappointing and extremely costly.

I had Sculptra and laser treatments for acne scarring and saw no noticeable improvement. Whenever I raised concerns, I felt dismissed by staff, who kept insisting that results were visible even though nothing had changed. Instead of listening, they would bring additional staff members over to tell me everything looked fine, which felt rehearsed and unhelpful.

Although the doctor is friendly and charismatic, it came across as more showmanship than genuine patient care. Pricing was inconsistent, with each session costing something different. When I wasn’t seeing results, I was encouraged to book even more treatments, despite already spending thousands of pounds.

The PA and receptionist were cold in their approach, and at no stage did I feel supported. When I expressed my concerns, they were shut down rather than addressed.

After my experience, and seeing that others have had similar issues, I would urge potential clients to be cautious. I regret my decision and wish I had gone elsewhere.

Dr. Ayoubi is honestly the worst doctor I have seen. He initially tries to put you at ease and gain your trust, but then tells you that you need a very large amount of product, justifying it based on your ethnicity, which felt inappropriate …

Very disappointed with this clinic. We showed up for our appointment, only to be told it was canceled after we had already arrived — with no prior notice at all. The staff were rude and unprofessional, and the doctor didn’t even meet us or say hello. My mother tried to explain that her English isn’t very good, but instead of being understanding, they kept saying “yes you do” and then hung up the phone on me. To make things worse, they didn’t even reimburse us for the transportation costs after wasting our time and money. This was a completely disrespectful and unpleasant experience. I do not recommend this clinic at all!!!!!!!
Shame on them and on the way they treated us!

Avoid. This place has the weirdest vibe around money - they don't tell you prices and try to hide prices from you. They act offended when you ask or question the price of anything. I did a consultation and as I was booking my appointment …

I had a very bizarre experience here. I came in for a consultation which cost £100. I was happy to go ahead with the procedure and they suggested a date, and I replied to say it was fine and asked a question also. After this I was ghosted, even after following up multiple times, ghosted.

What did I pay the £100 for? Feel very scammed.

I also agree with other reviewers that there was a weird vibe in the place, especially from the receptionists.

HORRIBLE NIGHTMARE

I am writing this review to express my utmost disappointment and concern …

I went to this clinic because I have dark circles and eye bags. They suggested me to get injections of hyaluronic acid. After 2 of them and 400 pounds less in my wallet, I was exactly like before. The doctor offered me for free the third one and still nothing. After that he refused to sort this out. Another doctor visited me and said that he probably used the cheapest and maybe even expired product because it's impossible not to get at least a minimum improvement.
I highly not recommend this place to anyone although the staff is very kind and nice.

I'm writing this review to pre warn anybody who would love to visit LMA clinic. From a simpy botox treatment doctor (A Al-Ayoubi)  made me look like I'm sleeping with my eyes open. My eyes are half way open. My eyelids are dropping down. …

When my mother suggested she wanted cosmetic surgery including derma filler to regain her youthful appearance, I was concerned. Having worked in the pharmaceutical industry I was aware of problems relating to the use of derma fillers on the complexion of someone in their advancing years.

She had searched online and viewed a YouTube video of Dr Ayham Al-Ayoubi at London Medical and Aesthetic Clinic who we understood had worked with some high profile faces so must be reputable. Upon consultation he said it would be no problem and although we weren't expecting it to be a cut and dry process, we also weren't expecting my mother to have such a disastrous reaction to the derma filler Sculptra.

Large swellings on her cheeks - expected to distend  - remained prominent after several weeks and began affecting her state of mind. When we questioned why this product was used on someone with age-related fat loss and relatively thin skin, we were told that it wouldn't be a long term problem as it would reduce over time and that further treatments were recommended to encounter the irregularity.

These turned out to be just as damaging and the results were worse. This led us to believe that either Dr Al-Ayoubi was overstating his skill as a plastic technician - as this product was clearly unsuitable - or we were being taken for a ride financially. Either way the results were looking irreversible. Questioning his integrity proved futile as he wasn't about to admit liability, so here we are three years down the road and no solution or redress.
If you think to visit this place for the first time, do not even think! Run from there!!! …

If you are looking for a CON MAN go and see Dr AYHAM  AL AYOUBI in Harley Street. I totally agree with all the reviews here, that calls this man a CHARLATAN.
A very unethical Dr, who charges high rates, but delivers substandard/poor treatment. An aggressive manner, and no skills.
DO Not GO there
This place should not be open for these services.
It was the worst experience I ever had.

This place is cheating people hugely. They didnt mention costs for treatments in website and receptionist has informed me it will cost max: 1500 pounds, then the doctor estimated said 2800 and additional almost 3000 pounds. I think its cleaver way of retaining initial consultation 100pounds. Please dont go here and if you still want to go ask them proper pricing and if its in your budget. Bit liars.

Unless ready to be ruined for life stay well away from from Al-Ayoubi.
The positive reviews are a fake not difficult to spot it.
Do not go here! Absolute con. I spent thousands for absolutely no improvement at all and when I’ve tried to speak to them about it they’ve ignored me and blocked me. Stay well away.
Very bad experience on the phone, caller had a very bad attitude and wasn't helpful at all. Very off-putting.
Made the issue I came for significantly worse
Apparently a cowboy. No more of these in the society plz

The place is spotless and very very pretty & aesthetically pleasing.

I booked a hydrafacial package. First session was great so continued to come …
Visited the clinic for acne scarring. The doctor was knowledgeable and professional and I was looking forward to getting the treatment he'd recommended. Then everything went downhill. …

After much research on the best way to remove lip lines and reduce under-eye dark circles, I selected Dr Ayoubi to carry out 2 sessions of CO2 laser in these areas followed by 3 sessions of dermal fillers in both areas. I was underwhelmed …
